en.text: to murmur,  growl,  roar,  cry aloud,  mourn,  rage,  sound,  make noise, tumult,  be clamorous,  be disquieted,  be loud,  be moved,  be troubled, be in an uproar

senses.gloss_en: to murmur,  growl,  roar,  cry aloud,  mourn,  rage,  sound,  make noise, tumult,  be clamorous,  be disquieted,  be loud,  be moved,  be troubled, be in an uproar
